hero.title: Quality is
hero.description: I merge technical engineering precision with human talent development to create exponential companies.

services.title: Solution Ecosystem
services.auditorDesc: Specialist in Quality (9001) and Environmental (14001) Management Systems. Over 30 years ensuring operational excellence.

certifications.title: Excellence Standards
certifications.description: ISO certifications are the gold standard for lead auditors.

modal.description1: As a Lead ISO Auditor, my approach goes beyond simple regulatory compliance. I implement robust management systems that act as the engine of continuous improvement in your organization.
modal.description2: My methodology includes deep diagnostics (Gap Analysis), custom process design, internal team training, and pre-certification audits.
modal.successText: I have successfully led certification processes in industries ranging from manufacturing to technology services, ensuring not just the certificate but a real transformation in the company's quality culture.
